summary: Testing iteration 36: Tenant Dashboard redirect bug fix verification. All 3 reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) /api/auth/me now returns created_at for tenants, 2) UnifiedLoginPage stores token in localStorage['token'] for AuthContext compatibility, 3) Products table uses correct field names (name_ar/name_en, retail_price, quantity). Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed). Frontend: 100% - all tabs navigate without redirect to login.

minor.issue: Returns 403 for some requests (visible in console logs) - not critical to tenant dashboard functionality

critical_code_review_comments: server.py Lines 1239-1270: get_current_user properly handles tenant users and adds created_at from saas_tenants record
UnifiedLoginPage.js Lines 47-52: Tenant login now stores token in both 'tenantToken' AND 'token' localStorage keys for Layout/AuthContext compatibility
TenantDashboardPage.js Lines 736-761: Products table correctly uses name_ar/name_en, retail_price, and quantity field names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant dashboard bug fix verified. Login flow works correctly: tenant logs in via /portal -> token stored in localStorage['token'] and localStorage['tenantToken'] -> redirected to /tenant/dashboard -> AuthContext reads token from localStorage['token'] -> /api/auth/me returns user with created_at -> dashboard tabs work without redirect to login.

issue_1_auth_me_created_at.description: /api/auth/me now returns created_at field for tenant users
issue_1_auth_me_created_at.verification: Backend test test_auth_me_returns_created_at passed - created_at field present in response

issue_2_token_storage.description: UnifiedLoginPage stores tenant token in localStorage['token'] for AuthContext compatibility
issue_2_token_storage.verification: UI test shows successful login and navigation without redirect to login page

issue_3_product_field_names.description: Products table uses correct field names (name_ar/name_en, retail_price, quantity)
issue_3_product_field_names.verification: Products tab displays products with correct names, prices, and stock values
